---
title: "run_rf3"
output: html_document
---

#### Package

```{r Packages}
# Install local dependency only when not already available.
require(ranger)
devtools::load_all("C:/Users/justu/Desktop/damagedata_analyser/R/packages/damageRF")

# if (!requireNamespace("damageRF", quietly = TRUE)) {
#   install.packages("remotes")
#   remotes::install_github("JustusWeyers/damagedata_analyser/R/packages/damageRF")
# }
```

#### Helpers

```{r rf2Helpers}
# Reuse plotting and PDF export helpers.
source("R/helpers.R")
```

#### Functions

```{r Functions}
fetch_data = function(db, bspid, dataset) {
  
  join_cols = c("ort", "baujahr", "tbwnr", "schad_id", "bsp_id")
  
  Aq = DBI::dbQuoteIdentifier(db, bspid)
  Bq = DBI::dbQuoteIdentifier(db, dataset)
  cols_q = DBI::dbQuoteIdentifier(db, join_cols)
  
  on_clause = paste(
    paste0(Bq, ".", cols_q),
    "=",
    paste0(Aq, ".", cols_q),
    collapse = " AND "
  )
  
  query = paste(
    "SELECT", Bq, ".*",
    "FROM", Bq,
    "INNER JOIN", Aq,
    "ON", on_clause,
    ";"
  )
  
  result = DBI::dbGetQuery(db, query)
  
  return(result)
}
```

## Setup

#### Database connection

```{r DB Connection}
# db_path = Sys.getenv("DATASET_PATH")

db_path = "C:/Users/justu/Desktop/damagedata_analyser/R/04randomforest_dgx/data/datasets/MERGEDB.db"

# Database connection
if (!RSQLite::dbCanConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), db_path)) {
  stop("Cannot connect to database at: ", db_path)
} else {
  db = RSQLite::dbConnect(RSQLite::SQLite(), db_path)
  print("Successfully connected to database.")
}
```

## Training

#### Characteristics

```{r TrainingCharacteristics}
# Store metadata and outputs in this list
training_characteristics = list(
  errors = list(),
  wd = getwd(),
  data_dir = "/data/datasets/",
  # output_dir = "/output/"
  output_dir = "C:/Users/justu/Desktop/damagedata_analyser/R/04randomforest_dgx/output"
)

# Capture session infos
training_characteristics[["session_info"]] = sessionInfo()

# Model name
training_characteristics[["model_name"]] = "rf3"

# Define Dataset
training_characteristics[["dataset"]] = "datasetY_1"
training_characteristics[["bspid"]] = Sys.getenv("BSPID")               

# Get subbspids
tablenames = DBI::dbListTables(db)
subbspids = gsub("DB", "", tablenames[startsWith(tablenames, paste0("DB", training_characteristics[["bspid"]]))])
training_characteristics[["subbspids"]] = sort(subbspids)
```

#### Modeling - Loop through sub-bspids

```{r Modeling}
# Take timestamp
training_characteristics[["start"]] = format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y")

# Dataset output dir
training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]] = paste0(
  training_characteristics[["output_dir"]], 
  "/",
  training_characteristics[["model_name"]], 
  "/",
  training_characteristics[["model_name"]], 
  "_", 
  format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S"), 
  "/", 
  training_characteristics[["dataset"]], 
  "/"
)
           
if (!dir.exists(training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]])) {
  dir.create(training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]], recursive = TRUE)
}

for (subbspid in training_characteristics[["subbspids"]]) {
  
  # Logging
  log_file = file.path(training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]], paste0("rf_", subbspid, ".log"))
  log_con = file(log_file, open = "wt")
  sink(log_con)
  sink(log_con, type = "message")
  cat(subbspid, "\n")
  cat("start: ", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S"), "\n\n")
  flush.console()
  
  # Read data
  print("Reading data")
  
  readin = fetch_data(db = db, bspid = paste0("DB", subbspid), dataset = training_characteristics[["dataset"]]) |>
    dplyr::mutate_if(is.character, factor)
  
  print(readin[1:6, 1:6])
  print(nrow(readin))
  print("...")
  
  # Skim data
  training_characteristics[["skim"]] = readin |> skimr::skim()
  
  # Fit one random forest per subbspid and persist artifacts.
  
  print("Starting RF model fitting")
  print(paste("Processing bsp_id:", subbspid))
  
  tryCatch({
    rf = damageRF::rf3(bspid = subbspid, prep = readin, target = "bsp_id", n = 1000, trees = 1000, n_boots = 3)
    saveRDS(rf, file.path(training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]], paste0("rf_", subbspid, ".rds")))
    
    training_characteristics[["metrics"]][[subbspid]] = rf@metrics
    training_characteristics[["size"]][[subbspid]] = rf@size
    
    flush.console()
  }, error = function(e) {
    training_characteristics[["errors"]][[subbspid]] = e 
    message("Fehler bei BSP-ID ", subbspid, ": ", e$message)
    flush.console()
  })
  
  cat("end: ", format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d_%H-%M-%S"), "\n")
  flush.console()
  
  sink(type = "message")
  sink()
  
  close(log_con)
  
  training_characteristics[["end"]] = format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S %d.%m.%Y")

}

# Training Report

print("Report")

# Collect saved RF model files for the final report plots.
files = list.files(training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]])
rf_files = startsWith(files, "rf_") & endsWith(files, ".rds")
rf_files = list.files(training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]], full.names = TRUE)[rf_files]
training_characteristics[["rf_files"]] = rf_files

rmarkdown::render(
  input = "report.Rmd",
  output_format = "pdf_document",
  output_file = "report.pdf",
  output_dir = training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]], 
  params = training_characteristics,
  envir = new.env()
)

saveRDS(
  training_characteristics, 
  file.path(training_characteristics[["dataset_out_dir"]], "training_characteristics.rds")
)

# Disconnect from database
RSQLite::dbDisconnect(db)
```
